network_boundaries.local: Localhost-only preview, read-only mocks, no WebSockets or EventSource
network_boundaries.production_requirement: Secure WSS (WebSocket Secure) or HTTPS with token authentication, TLS termination, CORS limits

authentication_and_secrets.local: None, runs strictly on local user context
authentication_and_secrets.production_requirement: IAM authorization, GCP Secret Manager for API keys, OAuth2 flow for operator cockpit

signature_policy.production_requirement: Strict Cosign signature required for all release artifacts, verified at deployment gate

database_mutations.local: Zero mutation capability, mock read-only telemetry
database_mutations.production_requirement: Write operations governed by transaction ledgers and explicit approval gate verification
